VaccineValidateR 0.0.1.0

  • Articles

Generate Cohort List with Age Calculations

Source: R/create_cohort.R
create_cohort.Rd

This function generates a cohort list from a dataset containing patient identifiers and dates of birth. It validates required columns, optionally renames them, ensures date consistency, and calculates age in both days and years.

Usage

create_cohort(
  patients,
  date_of_birth_column_name = "DOB",
  study_id_column_name = "STUDY_ID",
  reference_date = Sys.Date(),
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

patients

A data.table containing at least patient identifiers and date of birth.

date_of_birth_column_name

String. Name of the DOB column in patients. Default is "DOB".

study_id_column_name

String. Name of the patient identifier column. Default is "STUDY_ID".

reference_date

Optional. A Date used for age calculation. Default is Sys.Date().

verbose

Logical. Whether to print progress messages. Default is TRUE.

Value

A data.table with one row per patient, including:

  • DOB: earliest date of birth (as Date)

  • AGE_DAYS: age in days at reference_date

  • AGE_YEARS: age in years (decimal, using YEAR_LENGTH)

Examples

library(data.table)

# Example patient data
dt <- data.table(
  STUDY_ID = c(1, 2, 3),
  DOB = c("2020-01-15", "2019/07/30", "15-Mar-2018")
)

# Create cohort with default reference date (today)
cohort <- create_cohort(dt)
#> Starting patient cohort list development. Data validation step...
#> Warning: Dropped 2 row(s) with missing/unparseable DOB.
#> Data validated. Generating cohort.
#> Cohort list development complete. N = 1
print(cohort)
#>    STUDY_ID        DOB AGE_DAYS AGE_YEARS
#>       <num>     <Date>    <int>     <num>
#> 1:        1 2020-01-15     2071  5.670089

# Specify a fixed reference date for reproducibility
cohort_fixed <- create_cohort(dt, reference_date = as.Date("2025-01-01"))
#> Starting patient cohort list development. Data validation step...
#> Warning: Dropped 2 row(s) with missing/unparseable DOB.
#> Data validated. Generating cohort.
#> Cohort list development complete. N = 1
print(cohort_fixed)
#>    STUDY_ID        DOB AGE_DAYS AGE_YEARS
#>       <num>     <Date>    <int>     <num>
#> 1:        1 2020-01-15     1813  4.963723
